name: personal-corp-skills
description: Public Claude Code skills for Personal Corp, product work, safe public releases, AI operations, and agent-assisted development.

plugins.name: personal-corp-skills
plugins.description: Personal Corp framework: run your business with AI agents through GitHub. Includes planning, retro, GitHub ops, department repositories, safe public artifact releases, product management skills (PRD, prioritization, competitive analysis, feedback, metrics, roadmap), Telegram and agent-gateway workflows, meeting copilot, html-draft diagrams, media/art-direction workflows, and utility skills.
